flags.message: The provisioned snapshot is too sparse for a merits-sensitive petition-disposition prediction: it has no docket number, docket entries, dates, originating court, cert dates, legal issue, or lower-court posture. The prediction is therefore mostly base-rate calibrated.
A broad SCOTUS ranged corpus query was attempted for prior context, but the remote host could not be resolved in this sandbox and no priors or ranged-read statistics were returned.
